commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots and restores the managed npm plugin root around npm-backed installs/updates and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main writes the managed npm root dependency and runs npm before metadata/security validation, then rollback removes/uninstalls rather than restoring the previous root. I did not run the failing scenario because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review/merge is the only remaining lane; the PR already supplies a focused patch, tests, changelog, and sufficient real behavior proof, with no narrow repair for ClawSweeper to make.

target.title: Preserve npm plugin root when install validation blocks update
